title: Metal composition of ambient PM2.5 influences severity of allergic airways disease in mice.
ehr_evidence: The study uses a mouse model of allergic airways disease induced by ovalbumin (OVA) antigen.
summary: Experimental study using a mouse model to investigate if PM2.5 composition from industrial (Hettstedt) vs. non-industrial (Zerbst) cities influences the severity of allergic airways disease.
key_findings: Hypothesized that PM2.5 from Hettstedt would enhance allergic sensitization, airway responsiveness, and lung inflammation compared to PM2.5 from Zerbst.
